name: Sunset Picnic
description: A cozy mat, our favorite snacks, kite flying, a few card games and relaxing talks. Just us and the golden hour.

name: Tea Date
description: A cozy tea session at Clipper Tea, relax, chat, and learn more about each other with a little “get to know you” card game.

name: Tea Brewing Workshop
description: Explore the origins of tea, its role in Singaporean traditions, and the values of mindfulness and harmony it represents.

name: Painting
description: Unleash our creativity with a painting session. We'll have fun expressing ourselves on canvas.

name: Pottery
description: Create beautiful pottery pieces together. Maybe we can make matching mugs hehe

name: Tufting
description: Create a cozy rug or wall hanging together. A unique and creative date idea.

name: Coffee Shop Hopping
description: Explore the city's best cafés, try different drinks, and find our new favorite spot together.

name: Botanical Garden
description: Stroll through beautiful gardens, admire the flowers, and enjoy a peaceful escape into nature.
